endpoints.name: GET /{resourceId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/assessments/{assessmentName}
endpoints.description: Get a security assessment on your scanned resource
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ASSESSMENTNAME}} with a real assessmentname. Replace {{RESOURCEID}} with a real resourceid.

endpoints.name: PUT /{resourceId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/assessments/{assessmentName}
endpoints.description: Create a security assessment on your resource. An assessment metadata that describes this assessment must be predefined with the same name before inserting the assessment result
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ASSESSMENTNAME}} with a real assessmentname. Replace {{RESOURCEID}} with a real resourceid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{resourceId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/assessments/{assessmentName}
endpoints.description: Delete a security assessment on your resource. An assessment metadata that describes this assessment must be predefined with the same name before inserting the assessment result
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ASSESSMENTNAME}} with a real assessmentname. Replace {{RESOURCEID}} with a real resourceid.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Security/assessments
endpoints.description: Get security assessments on all your scanned resources inside a scope
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.
